landing.summary: Use this page to manage administrator workbench in the Landing section. It reads from /api/v1/admin/health, /api/v1/admin/activity.
landing.scope: Platform admins see tenant-scoped data; super admins can review platform-wide data where the API permits.
landing.safety: Before applying changes, verify the backing data: summary counters, incidents, approvals, audit-chain status. Use previews, typed confirmations, or 2PA when the action tier requires it.
